race.comment: Lots of scratchings have changed the race paving the way for another win from FONDLED (10). Progressive type in great form. Just missed fresh then off the mark latest taking the maiden win. Lots of the pace taken out of the race and will roll forward like last time. At top now and looks set to go close again. WARPARTY (2) is back at the races for the first time since October 18. Scored over 1200m at Mornington to launch the last campaign. Expect him to play a major role here at home and with the claim. MALLEE GOLD (9) was a fresh-up winner and can only be fitter. Up in grade but can go on with it.  TURN UP THE NIGHT (1) is better than last start so he deserves another chance.
